mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resume WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT resume_id, member_id, birth_date, address, github_url, portfolio_url, is_primary, created_at, updated_at FROM resume WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY resume_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume (member_id, address, github_url, portfolio_url, is_primary, updated_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{address}, #{githubUrl}, #{portfolioUrl}, #{isPrimary}, CURRENT_DATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE resume SET address = #{address}, github_url = #{githubUrl}, portfolio_url = #{portfolioUrl}, updated_at = CURRENT_DATE WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId}
UPDATE member SET name = #{name} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO career (resume_id, company_name, job_position, start_date, end_date, employment_type, main_duties) VALUES (#{resumeId}, #{companyName}, #{jobPosition}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{employmentType}, #{mainDuties})
mapper.select: SELECT skill_id FROM skill WHERE skill_name = #{name} LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version_no), 0) FROM resume_version WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume_version (resume_id, version_no, label, snapshot) VALUES (#{resumeId}, #{versionNo}, #{label}, #{snapshot})
mapper.select: SELECT version_id, resume_id, version_no, label, snapshot, created_at FROM resume_version WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY version_no ASC
SELECT created_at FROM resume_version WHERE version_id = #{versionId}
